menu.noGroups: No groups yet. Right-click an account → Add to group.

sidebar.importPrompt: Import a maFile to get started.

pane.noAccounts: No accounts yet — import a maFile from “Account” above.
pane.selectAccount: Select an account to view its code.

conf.loadHint: Fetched from Steam only on request — this avoids Steam's rate limit.
conf.sessionTitle: Session expired — sign in to continue

import.sdaPrompt: This maFile is SDA-encrypted. Enter the SDA password:
import.errNetwork: Network error — check your connection and try again.
import.errInvalidPassword: Wrong SDA password — please try again.
import.errCorruptMaFile: The selected file is corrupt or not a valid maFile.
import.errSessionExpired: Session expired — please log in again.
import.errRateLimited: Steam is rate-limiting requests — wait a moment and retry.
import.errSteamError: Steam returned an error — see details below.
import.sdaReportSkipped_one: Skipped {{count}} account already in the vault.
import.sdaReportSkipped_other: Skipped {{count}} accounts already in the vault.

unlock.subtitle: Enter your master password to unlock the vault.
unlock.wrong: Incorrect master password — please try again.
unlock.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

firstRun.title: Welcome to StewardAuth
firstRun.subtitle: Would you like to protect your vault with a master password?
firstRun.hint: Choose a strong master password. You will need it every time StewardAuth starts.
firstRun.enableError: Failed to enable encryption. Please try again.
firstRun.skipError: Failed to save preference. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pollHint: How often each account is checked for pending confirmations. Lower values react faster but risk Steam's rate limit. Minimum {{min}}s.
settings.enableHint: Choose a strong master password. You will need it every time StewardAuth launches.
settings.encEnabled: Encryption enabled. Vault is now protected.
settings.encDisabled: Encryption disabled. Vault is now unencrypted.
settings.encEnableFailed: Failed to enable encryption. Please try again.
settings.encDisableFailed: Failed to disable encryption. Please try again.
settings.removeWarn: Removing "{{name}}" will delete it from the vault and Keychain. This cannot be undone.
settings.removeFailed: Failed to remove account. Please try again.
settings.accentHint: Drag to change the app's accent color.

dataDir.title: Data Directory
dataDir.hint: The folder where your maFiles and settings are stored. Changing it moves all data to the new location.

tradeGate.title: Enable trade auto-confirm?
tradeGate.bodyOne: Incoming trade confirmations for “{{name}}” will be accepted automatically without review. Trades are irreversible. Continue?
tradeGate.bodyMany: Incoming trade confirmations for {{count}} accounts will be accepted automatically without review. Trades are irreversible. Continue?

confirmLogin.loadHint: Fetched from Steam only on request.
confirmLogin.respondError: Unexpected error responding to the login.

deleteGate.title: Delete account?
deleteGate.body: Delete {{name}}? Its maFile will be permanently deleted.

link.title: Create authenticator
link.rateLimited: Too many attempts — try again later.
link.emailGuardTitle: Enter the Steam Guard code from your email
link.emailGuardHint: Steam emailed a code so you can sign in.
link.phoneHint: Leave blank to receive the confirmation code by email.
link.invalidPhone: Enter the number in international format, starting with + and country code (e.g. +15551234567).
link.confirmPhoneEmailBody: Click the confirmation link Steam emailed you, then press Continue.
link.emailCodeTitle: Enter the code from your email
link.alreadyLinked: This account already has an authenticator — use Import instead.
link.timeSyncFailed: Could not sync time with Steam. Please try again.
link.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
link.revocationWarn: Save this recovery code. It is the ONLY way to remove the authenticator if you lose access to this device.
link.savedCheckbox: I have saved my recovery code
